controls.control_objective: To ensure also be involved in implementation of various forms of debt relief schemes (drs) announced by state governments that inter alia entail sacrifice / wai
controls.control_description:
Some of the Regional Rural Banks (RRBs) may also be involved in implementation of
various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that
inter alia entail sacrifice / waiver of debt obligations of a targeted segment of
borrowers, against fiscal support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be involved in implementation of various forms of debt relief schemes (drs) announced by state governments that inter alia entail sacrifice / wai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be counter- productive to the credit flow to such borrowers
controls.control_description:
If such schemes are announced frequently,
incommensurately, or without due consideration to the principles of financial discipline,
they would negatively affect credit discipline and in the long run, may be counter-
productive to the credit flow to such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be counter- productive to the credit flow to such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect unless specified otherwise
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect unless specified
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect unless specified otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks as defined under clause (ja) to section 5 of banking regulation act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks as defined under
clause (ja) to Section 5 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks as defined under clause (ja) to section 5 of banking regulation act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context otherwise
requires:
(1) 'compromise settlement' shall refer to any negotiated arrangement with the
borrower to fully settle the claims of a bank against the borrower in cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure entail some sacrifice of the amount due from the borrower on the part of the bank with corresponding waiver of claims of the bank against the borrower
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Compromise settlement may entail some sacrifice of the
amount due from the borrower on the part of the bank with corresponding
waiver of claims of the bank against the borrower to that extent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entail some sacrifice of the amount due from the borrower on the part of the bank with corresponding waiver of claims of the bank against the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the date on which the borrower and the bank agree to proceed with a resolution plan through a documented arrangement, other than in case of deeme
controls.control_description:
1(1A) 'date of invocation' for the purpose of Chapter IV-A of these Directions shall
mean the date on which the borrower and the bank agree to proceed
with a resolution plan through a documented arrangement, other than in
case of deemed invocation as specified in paragraph 32O of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the date on which the borrower and the bank agree to proceed with a resolution plan through a documented arrangement, other than in case of deeme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean non-payment of debt (as defined under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016) when whole or any part or instalment of the debt has become due a
controls.control_description:
(2) 'default' shall mean non-payment of debt (as defined under the Insolvency
and Bankruptcy Code, 2016) when whole or any part or instalment of the
debt has become due and payable and is not paid by the debtor or the
corporate debtor, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean non-payment of debt (as defined under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016) when whole or any part or instalment of the debt has become due a

controls.control_objective: To ensure for revolving facilities like cash credit, default would also mean, without prejudice to the above, the outstanding balance remaining 1 inserted with
controls.control_description:
Provided that for revolving facilities like cash credit, default would also
mean, without prejudice to the above, the outstanding balance remaining
1 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to for revolving facilities like cash credit, default would also mean, without prejudice to the above, the outstanding balance remaining 1 inserted with

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy for restructuring / rehabilitation of stressed assets
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a Board-approved policy for restructuring / rehabilitation of
stressed assets.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy for restructuring / rehabilitation of stressed assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board-approved policies for undertaking compromise settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place Board-approved policies for undertaking compromise
settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter
alia include the following:
(1) comprehensive prescription of the process to be followed for all compromise
settlements and technical write-offs, with specific guidance on the necessary
conditions precedent such as minimum ageing, deterioration in collateral
value etc.;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board-approved policies for undertaking compromise settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the board
controls.control_description:
(2) graded framework for examination of staff accountability in such cases with
reasonable thresholds and timelines as may be decided by the Board;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be) which is at least one level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to sanction the credit / investment exposure
controls.control_description:
(i) delegation of power for such approvals rests with an authority
(individual or committee, as the case may be) which is at least one
level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to
sanction the credit / investment exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be) which is at least one level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to sanction the credit / investment exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be part of the approving the <image> proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any capacity
controls.control_description:
Provided that any official who was part of sanctioning the loan (as
individual or part of a committee) shall not be part of the approving the
<image>
proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any
capacity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be part of the approving the <image> proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any capacity

controls.control_objective: To ensure require approval of the board in all cases
controls.control_description:
(ii) proposals for compromise settlements in respect of borrowers
classified as fraud or wilful defaulter, as permitted in terms of
paragraphs 16 to 31, shall require approval of the Board in all cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require approval of the board in all cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate provisions for resolution as provided for under chapter iv-a of these directions, including the following: (1) the objective principles fo
controls.control_description:
The board approved policy of the bank shall incorporate provisions for
resolution as provided for under Chapter IV-A of these Directions, including the
following:
(1) the objective principles for the terms of relief to be granted to various
borrower / loan categories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate provisions for resolution as provided for under chapter iv-a of these directions, including the following: (1) the objective principles fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure recognise incipient stress in loan accounts, immediately on default, by classifying such assets as special mention accounts (sma) as per the following
controls.control_description:
A bank shall recognise incipient stress in loan accounts, immediately on default, by
classifying such assets as special mention accounts (SMA) as per the following
categories:
Loans in the nature of revolving facilities like cash credit/overdraft
Loans other than revolving facilities
Basis for classification -
Outstanding balance remains continuously in excess of the sanctioned
Basis for classification -
SMA Sub- categor
Principal or interest payment or any other amount wholly or partly
SMA Sub- categories
limit or drawing power, whichever is lower, for a
ies
overdue
period of:
SMA-0 Upto 30 days
3 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recognise incipient stress in loan accounts, immediately on default, by classifying such assets as special mention accounts (sma) as per the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the relevant provisions on submission of financial information to information utilities of insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 and insolven
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to the relevant provisions on submission of financial information
to information utilities of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Board of India (Information Utilities) Regulations, 2017 and put in place
appropriate systems and procedures to ensure compliance to the provisions of the
Code and Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the relevant provisions on submission of financial information to information utilities of insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 and insolven

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable disclosures in its financial statements in the 'notes to accounts', as specified in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - fi
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its financial statements in the 'Notes to
Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable disclosures in its financial statements in the 'notes to accounts', as specified in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such category for at least one year of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or reschedul
controls.control_description:
An asset where the terms of the loan agreement regarding interest and principal
have been renegotiated or rescheduled, should be classified as sub-standard and
should remain in such category for at least one year of satisfactory performance
under the renegotiated or rescheduled terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such category for at least one year of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or reschedul

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above condition
controls.control_description:
The classification of an asset shall not be upgraded merely as a result of
rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain ineligible for restructuring
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who have committed frauds/ malfeasance/ wilful default as well as any
entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall remain ineligible for
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain ineligible for restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
A wilful defaulter or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall be
eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from
the List of Wilful Defaulters, subject to penal measures applicable to borrowers
classified as wilful defaulter in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank
controls.control_description:
The objective of compromise settlements shall be to maximise the possible recovery
from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements and technical write-offs shall be without prejudice to
any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating
to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank, subject to such claims not
being recognised in any manner on the balance sheet of the bank at the time of the
settlement or subsequently till actual realization of such receivables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Provided that any such claims recognised on the balance sheet of the bank shall
render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 18, compromise settlements where the time for payment
of the agreed settlement amount exceeds three months shall be treated as
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto
controls.control_description:
Any arrangement involving part settlement with the borrower shall also fall under the
definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undermined in any manner
controls.control_description:
However,
such technical write-offs do not entail any waiver of claims against the borrower and
thus the bank's right to recovery shall not be undermined in any manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undermined in any manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the original exposure
controls.control_description:
In case of partial technical write-offs, the prudential requirements in respect of
residual exposure, including provisioning and asset classification, shall be with
reference to the original exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the original exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset
controls.control_description:
Provided that the amount of provision including the amount representing partial
technical write-off shall meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on
the gross value of the asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
controls.control_description:
There shall be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a
quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
approved by a particular authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board
controls.control_description:
Provided that compromise settlements and technical write-offs approved by the MD
& CEO / Board Level Committee shall be reported to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo
controls.control_description:
The Board shall mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate
coverage of the following aspects at the minimum:
(1) trend in number of accounts and amounts subjected to compromise
settlement and/or technical write-off (q-o-q and y-o-y);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers
controls.control_description:
In respect of borrowers subject to compromise settlements, there shall be a cooling
period as determined by the respective Board approved policies before the bank can
assume fresh exposures to such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided that the cooling period in respect of exposures other than farm credit
exposures shall be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate
higher cooling periods in terms of their Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by a bank as per their respective board approved policies
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided further that the cooling period for farm credit exposures shall be
determined by a bank as per their respective Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by a bank as per their respective board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to credit extended to agricultural activities as listed in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - income recognition, asset classific
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Farm credit for the above purpose shall refer to credit extended to
agricultural activities as listed in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to credit extended to agricultural activities as listed in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - income recognition, asset classific

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policies of a bank
controls.control_description:
The cooling period to be adopted in respect of exposures subjected to technical
write-offs shall be as per the Board approved policies of a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the board approved policies of a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri
controls.control_description:
A bank may undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of
accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the criminal
proceeding underway against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable in cases where a bank enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs
controls.control_description:
The penal measures applicable to borrowers classified as fraud or wilful defaulter in
terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in Commercial Banks
(including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial Institutions) Directions, 2024
and the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Treatment of Wilful
Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025, respectively, shall continue to be
applicable in cases where a bank enter into compromise settlement with such
borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs 25 and 26, in respect of
such borrowers, shall be without prejudice to such penal measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable in cases where a bank enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a preferred option
controls.control_description:
As long as larger policy concerns are suitably addressed and the costs of malafide
actions are made to be borne by the perpetrators, early recoveries by a bank should
be a preferred option, subject to safeguards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a preferred option

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements with the borrowers under these Directions shall be
without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirement under paragraph 29, wherever a bank had
commenced recovery proceedings under a judicial forum and the same is pending
before such judicial forum, any settlement arrived at with the borrower shall be
subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹20 lakh
controls.control_description:
The monetary ceiling of cases referred to the Lok Adalats organised by Civil Courts
for compromise settlements shall be ₹20 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹20 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to resolution of exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis, exposures of borrowers impacted by external
controls.control_description: The instructions contained in this Chapter shall be applicable to resolution of exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis, exposures of borrowers impacted by external events such as riots / disturbances that result in loss to economic activity (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'calamity'), upon the declaration of such calamity by the Central / State Governments (in accordance with the framework placed by the concerned Government for this purpose).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to resolution of exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis, exposures of borrowers impacted by external

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to borrower accounts where relief measures have already been provided as on the effective date of these amendment directions, and such accounts
controls.control_description: These instructions shall not apply to borrower accounts where relief measures have already been provided as on the effective date of these Amendment Directions, and such accounts shall continue to be guided by the existing prudential guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to borrower accounts where relief measures have already been provided as on the effective date of these amendment directions, and such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the guidelines contained in this chapter
controls.control_description: However, any fresh resolution in such accounts subsequent to the effective date of these Amendment Directions shall be as per the guidelines contained in this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the guidelines contained in this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the principles enshrined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025 dated novemb
controls.control_description: For the purpose of resolution under this Chapter, bank shall be guided by the principles enshrined in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the principles enshrined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025 dated novemb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as the date of occurrence
controls.control_description: Explanation: In case no specific date of occurrence is ascertainable in respect of a calamity, the date of declaration of such calamity by the Central / State Governments shall be treated as the date of occurrence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as the date of occurrence

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be considered for resolution under other provisions of these directions
controls.control_description: Borrowers, whose loan accounts do not fulfil the required eligibility conditions for resolution under this Chapter may continue to be considered for resolution under other provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be considered for resolution under other provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the refinance portfolio of a bank
controls.control_description: The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to the refinance portfolio of a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the refinance portfolio of a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene a special slbc / utlbc meeting within 15 days of such declaration
controls.control_description: Upon declaration of a calamity, if a larger part of the State / Union Territory (UT) has been affected, the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank shall convene a special SLBC / UTLBC meeting within 15 days of such declaration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene a special slbc / utlbc meeting within 15 days of such declaration

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene the meeting within 15 days of such declaration, after due consultation with the slbc / utlbc convenor bank
controls.control_description: If the calamity has affected only a part of the State / UT, the convenor of the DCC of the affected district(s) shall convene the meeting within 15 days of such declaration, after due consultation with the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene the meeting within 15 days of such declaration, after due consultation with the slbc / utlbc convenor bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the res
controls.control_description: In the special SLBC / UTLBC / DCC meeting, the position of the affected areas may be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the REs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the res

controls.control_objective: To ensure also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period required
controls.control_description: SLBC / UTLBC / DCC may also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period required, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period required

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank immediately to all slbc / utlbc members along with the minutes of the meeting
controls.control_description: The decisions taken in the special SLBC / UTLBC meeting(s) as mentioned at paragraph 32F above, shall be conveyed by the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank immediately to all SLBC / UTLBC members along with the minutes of the meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank immediately to all slbc / utlbc members along with the minutes of the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank 6 inserted with effect from july 1, 2026, vide reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resol
controls.control_description:
A copy of the same shall also be forwarded by the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank
6 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank 6 inserted with effect from july 1, 2026, vide reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resol

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed by the dcc convenor bank immediately to the dcc members and the slbc / utlbc along with the minutes of the meeting
controls.control_description: The decisions taken in the special DCC meeting(s) shall be conveyed by the DCC convenor bank immediately to the DCC members and the SLBC / UTLBC along with the minutes of the meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed by the dcc convenor bank immediately to the dcc members and the slbc / utlbc along with the minutes of the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded by the dcc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the nbfcs / ucbs operating in the area
controls.control_description: A copy of the same shall also be forwarded by the DCC convenor bank to the respective Regional Office of Reserve Bank and the NBFCs / UCBs operating in the area.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded by the dcc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the nbfcs / ucbs operating in the area

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given adequate publicity by slbcs / utlbc / dccs / banks through various methods such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by
controls.control_description: The decisions taken in the special SLBC / UTLBC / DCC meeting(s) shall be given adequate publicity by SLBCs / UTLBC / DCCs / banks through various methods such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by field staff, and other suitable modes, for the benefit of affected borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given adequate publicity by slbcs / utlbc / dccs / banks through various methods such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, recommends extending relief measures to the impacted borrowers, banks may implement resolution plans in respect of such borrowers in terms of the
controls.control_description: Where the SLBC / UTLBC / DCC, as the case may be, recommends extending relief measures to the impacted borrowers, banks may implement resolution plans in respect of such borrowers in terms of the provisions of this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, recommends extending relief measures to the impacted borrowers, banks may implement resolution plans in respect of such borrowers in terms of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for resolution under this chapter whose accounts are classified as 'standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days with the
controls.control_description: Those borrowers shall be eligible for resolution under this Chapter whose accounts are classified as 'Standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days with the bank in respect of any of their facilities, as on the date of occurrence of the calamity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for resolution under this chapter whose accounts are classified as 'standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take into account the insurance proceeds
controls.control_description: While restructuring various types of loans in an area affected by a calamity, banks may also take into account the insurance proceeds, if any, receivable from insurance companies in respect of those loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take into account the insurance proceeds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adjusted towards the 'restructured accounts' in cases where fresh loans have been granted to the borrower
controls.control_description: The insurance proceeds upon receipt shall be adjusted towards the 'restructured accounts' in cases where fresh loans have been granted to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adjusted towards the 'restructured accounts' in cases where fresh loans have been granted to the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider restructuring and sanctioning fresh loans without waiting for the actual receipt of the claim
controls.control_description: However, a bank may consider restructuring and sanctioning fresh loans without waiting for the actual receipt of the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider restructuring and sanctioning fresh loans without waiting for the actual receipt of the claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the eligible categories of borrowers without any exception
controls.control_description: Interest Subvention / Prompt Repayment Incentive benefits as notified by the Government from time to time shall be made available to the eligible categories of borrowers without any exception.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the eligible categories of borrowers without any exception

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the relief measures already provided / being provided by goi / states are duly factored in
controls.control_description: While extending the relief measures under this Chapter, a bank shall ensure that the relief measures already provided / being provided by GoI / States are duly factored in.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the relief measures already provided / being provided by goi / states are duly factored in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-crop
controls.control_description: For agricultural loans, where land is taken as security, certificate issued by the Revenue Department officials, in the absence of original title record, shall be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-croppers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-crop

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted
controls.control_description: In the areas covered by the Sixth Schedule of the Constitution, whereby the land is owned by the community, certificate issued by community authorities shall be accepted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted

controls.control_objective: To ensure upload the notification(s) issued by state / district authorities on declaration of a calamity for which relief measures were implemented by slbc / ut
controls.control_description: The SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank shall upload the notification(s) issued by State / District Authorities on declaration of a calamity for which relief measures were implemented by SLBC / UTLBC / DCC / banks, on the CIMS portal, within 15 days of the special SLBC / UTLBC / DCC convened for extending relief measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to upload the notification(s) issued by state / district authorities on declaration of a calamity for which relief measures were implemented by slbc / ut

controls.control_objective: To ensure upload the data on relief measures on a half-yearly basis within 30 days from the end of the half-year (september 30th and march 31st of every year) o
controls.control_description: Banks shall upload the data on relief measures on a half-yearly basis within 30 days from the end of the half-year (September 30th and March 31st of every year) on the CIMS portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to upload the data on relief measures on a half-yearly basis within 30 days from the end of the half-year (september 30th and march 31st of every year) o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uploaded by the bank
controls.control_description:
In case no relief measures are extended, a 'NIL' statement shall be uploaded by the bank.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be uploaded by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide on participating in a particular drs notified by a government, based on its board approved policy
controls.control_description:
A bank may decide on participating in a particular DRS notified by a Government,
based on its Board approved policy, subject to the extant regulatory norms.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide on participating in a particular drs notified by a government, based on its board approved policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure warrant modification in long term interest of the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the concerned authority/ies
controls.control_description:
Any provision of the scheme that may warrant modification in long term interest of
the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the
concerned authority/ies through the State Level Bankers' Committee / District level
Consultative Committee, during the consultation phase while designing the DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to warrant modification in long term interest of the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the concerned authority/ies

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the drs, inclu
controls.control_description:
A bank shall clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their
books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the DRS, including
the accumulated interest in non-performing accounts, by the time the dues are
settled under the DRS, to enable the Government to suitably arrange for the extent
of fiscal participation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the drs, inclu

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the borrowers to be covered under drs are selected strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the au
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the borrowers to be covered under DRS are selected strictly
as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the
authorities on technical grounds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the borrowers to be covered under drs are selected strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the au

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions of the scheme as well as the prudential aspects, including
cooling period for extending fresh credit, impact on credit score etc., shall be clearly
communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the
borrower for availing benefits under a proposed DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 16 to 31
controls.control_description:
Any waiver of accrued but unrealised interest and/ or sacrifice of principal
undertaken by a bank in the borrower accounts of beneficiaries of the DRS, either
as part of the implementation of the scheme or subsequent to its implementation,
shall be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential
treatment contained in paragraphs 16 to 31.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 16 to 31

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations
controls.control_description:
If the funds received by a bank as part of the DRS covers the entire outstanding
dues of the borrower, including principal and interest accrued till the date of receipt
<image>
of funds by the bank, the same shall lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract
controls.control_description:
In cases where the funds received by a bank as part of the scheme are not adequate
to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrower, leading to residual exposure
(principal and / or accrued interest), the asset classification of the residual exposure
shall be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein
controls.control_description:
Provided that any changes / modifications to the terms and conditions of the original
loan contract in such cases shall be evaluated against the test of restructuring as
defined in these Directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the commercial discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy
controls.control_description:
Any fresh credit exposure to such borrowers shall be as per the commercial
discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy, subject to extant applicable
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the commercial discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard
controls.control_description:
A bank's reporting in respect of the borrowers under the scheme to the credit
information companies shall be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds
controls.control_description:
There shall not be creation of any receivable against the Government on account of
the DRS and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds
by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou
controls.control_description:
Till receipt of funds, a bank shall continue to apply the prudential norms including
prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and
wherever the accounts are non-performing, the bank may pursue recovery measures
as per their Board approved policy against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets con
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in paragraphs 33 to 44 shall apply in respect of DRS
notified on or after December 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the
instructions on resolution of stressed assets contained in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets con

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract specific provision of 100%
controls.control_description:
In respect of relief measures announced prior to December 31, 2024, any dues
pending receipt from Government, for more than 90 days shall attract specific
provision of 100%.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract specific provision of 100%

controls.control_objective: To ensure take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 47
controls.control_description:
A bank shall take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective
Governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 47.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 47

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202
controls.control_description:
To mitigate the burden of debt servicing brought about by trade disruptions caused
by global headwinds and to ensure the continuity of viable businesses, banks may
extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under Reserve Bank of
India (Trade Relief Measures) Directions, 2025 dated November 14, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions and guidelines
already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions, and guidelines listed in the
above notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure to sacrifice / waive
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of the Model Operating Procedure (MOP), Debt Relief Schemes (DRS)
refer to Schemes notified by the State Governments that entail funding by the fiscal
authorities to cover debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers that the regulated
entities are required to sacrifice / waive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to sacrifice / waive

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support
controls.control_description:
Announcement / notification of any such DRS should include the specific stress or
distress situation necessitating announcement of such support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed
controls.control_description:
Given the broader
implications of such DRS for the credit culture, while broad based relief measures can be
addressed through pure fiscal support in the form of Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT), DRS
should be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate
financial stress have failed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali
controls.control_description:
Before announcing any DRS, Governments may engage with the State Level Bankers'
Committee (SLBC)/ District level Consultative Committee (DCC) to evolve a coordinated
action plan for conceptualisation, design, and implementation of the DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali

controls.control_objective: To ensure , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning
controls.control_description:
The schemes
should, cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact
assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning settlement of dues
by Government to the lending institutions, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments
controls.control_description:
The design features should ensure that the DRS do not impact the financial stability
aspects of the region / State or create moral hazards in the borrower segments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken into account
controls.control_description: should also be taken into account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts
controls.control_description:
Detailed budgetary provisions / funding may be provided upfront towards any proposed
DRS to fully cover the required settlement amounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis
controls.control_description:
Where regulated entities have dues
<image>
from the Government, pertaining to earlier DRS schemes, new schemes should be
announced only on a fully pre-funded basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments
controls.control_description:
The DRS should be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain
any restrictive covenant against timely repayments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date
controls.control_description:
Further, it should specify the criteria
for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical /
material events, including cut-off dates for filing/ submission, acknowledgement, approval
and settlement of claims along with compensation clauses for delays in settling the funds,
on part of the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th
controls.control_description:
The DRS should cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered,
including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by the
regulated entities from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated
entity against the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government
controls.control_description:
The exposure of regulated entities to the borrower shall
continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally be completed within 45 to 60 days
controls.control_description:
The entire implementation of the Scheme and settlement of claims by the Governments
to the regulated entities, should generally be completed within 45 to 60 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally be completed within 45 to 60 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by rbi / nabard
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued
by RBI / NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by rbi / nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision that casts any obligations on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to: a
controls.control_description:
The design of the DRS should not contain any provision that casts any obligations on
the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any provision that casts any obligations on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the applicable prudential guidelines
controls.control_description:
<image>
However, if the regulated entities agree to any of the above at the time of design of DRS
or subsequently, as per their Board-approved policies, it shall be subject to the applicable
prudential guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to the applicable prudential guidelines
